name: compliance fetch: per-operation gate passes when last fetched_at is within fetch_frequency window
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch && echo "2026-05-12T08:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/compliance-last-fetch/nist-csf-2.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/freshness-gate.sh" --framework-id nist-csf-2 --fetch-frequency weekly --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z && echo ok 1>&2
